calendar_assumption: ETF-era daily panel uses dates with ETF flow observations; BTC/ETH returns run from the prior ETF trading date to the current ETF trading date.
timing_note: Farside daily issuer aggregates; holidays/non-reporting days are not treated as zero unless source reports zero.
